title: LLM Model Spec
description: Backend-agnostic LLM model specification. The model spec string determines which backend handles it.
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies an LLM model without committing to a specific inference backend. The runtime inspects the model files and routes the request to the appropriate backend (GGUF, MLX, Candle, etc.) based on what is available.

## When to use
Use this variant when the cap or workflow should remain backend-agnostic and let the runtime select the best available backend for the current hardware. Use a backend-specific variant such as `media:model-spec;gguf;textable;llm` when you need to target a particular runtime.

## Notes
The default points to a Mistral-7B GGUF repository with filters for Q8_0 quantization. Operators should override this default to match the models they have provisioned.
